## Crop labor inputs

```{r}
#| label: crop labor table

# household df
crop_labor_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "crop_labor_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

# members df
crop_labor_members_df<- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "crop_labor_members_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::crop_labor(
  hhold_df = crop_labor_hhold_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  grew_crops_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$crop_labor_grew_crops_var),
  grew_crops_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$crop_labor_grew_crops_val),
  paid_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$crop_labor_paid_var),
  free_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$crop_labor_free_var),
  members_df = crop_labor_members_df,
  member_worked_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$crop_labor_member_worked_var),
  member_worked_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$crop_labor_member_worked_val),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
